title: DILLSTRADAMUS
notes: DILLSTRADAMUS is the B2B collab name for Dillon Francis + Flosstradamus (World Grand Championship Global Tour, Buckhead Theatre, Aug 8 2026). No officialUrl/ticketUrl in events.json; Ticketmaster event page returned 401 (not retried per instructions). Used Flosstradamus's Songkick artist photo since it's the primary billed act on the tour page; Dillon Francis's Songkick photo (huge_avatar, artist 3215901) is an equally valid alternate if a different image is preferred.

title: Soular Flare
notes: Low confidence match. Event is a recurring 1st-Sunday breathwork/live-guitar/song-creation gathering at MASS Collective, Atlanta (no officialUrl/ticketUrl/youtubeId). Could not find an event-specific page. Instagram account @soular_flare surfaced in search but I could not confirm it is the same organizer as this MASS Collective series — only a small (100x100) profile-pic-sized og:image was available. Treat as a placeholder-quality guess; verify before using in production, or replace with a MASS Collective venue photo instead.

title: Wax'n'Facts 50th Anniversary
notes: No officialUrl/ticketUrl in events.json. Event confirmed via web search: Variety Playhouse, Jul 19 2026, 6:30pm, presented by Zero Mile Presents, tickets via AXS (AXS event page returned 403, not retried per instructions; Ticketmaster venue page also blocked). Used Variety Playhouse's own venue og:image as a venue-relevant fallback since no event-specific poster/photo was reachable.

title: Elevated Rhythms — Free Outdoor House
notes: officialUrl/ticketUrl is shotgun.live/en/events/er927 but that URL is behind a Vercel security checkpoint (both curl and WebFetch blocked/429'd). Event is a recurring free outdoor house/afrobeats series at East Point City Hall, produced by City of East Point + Tambor Party. Used Tambor Party's Instagram profile pic og:image as a producer/series-relevant fallback (small 100x100 image).

title: MVMT LABS — Nick Portolese
notes: No officialUrl/ticketUrl/youtubeId. Event is a monthly movement-lab series ('MVMT LABS') hosted by Sol Dance at First Existentialist Congregation of Atlanta, Candler Park, with rotating practitioners (April: Nick Portolese). soldancemovement.com actively rejects TLS handshakes from curl/WebFetch (bot protection) so could not get the series' own site image. Used Sol Dance's Instagram profile pic og:image as a host-organization fallback (small 100x100 image). Could not verify Nick Portolese's individual identity/photo.

title: Stockbridge Jazz Festival
notes: ticketUrl in events.json is the Ticketmaster VENUE page (not an individual event page), which was NOT blocked (only individual TM event pages return 401 per the playbook) and returned a usable og:image (venue/amphitheater photo, s1.ticketm.net).

title: Plazadrome: Citizen Ruth (4K)
notes: officialUrl/ticketUrl (plazaatlanta.com) is a JS-rendered SPA that only returns a loading-splash shell via curl/WebFetch — no event-specific og:image reachable. Plazadrome is Videodrome + Plaza Theatre's monthly series screening a 4K restoration of Alexander Payne's 1996 film Citizen Ruth. Used the official 1996 theatrical poster from IMP Awards (a legitimate movie-poster archive) as the film-relevant image.

title: Juneteenth Celebration
notes: officialUrl/ticketUrl (high.org) is Cloudflare-protected and returns 403 to curl/WebFetch. Event is the High Museum of Art's free Juneteenth 'Access for All' day, Jun 19 2026. Used the High Museum's Instagram profile pic og:image as a venue-relevant fallback (small 100x100 image).

title: Concert for the Community
notes: ticketUrl is a Facebook event page that only exposes a description meta tag (no og:image) without login. Event features Spirit of Atlanta Drum & Bugle Corps and Atlanta Youth Jazz at The Center at CNN Studios, Jun 30 2026. Used Spirit of Atlanta's Instagram profile pic og:image as a lineup-relevant fallback (small 100x100 image).

title: Magic for Adults
notes: og:image found directly on officialUrl/ticketUrl (themagicofericeaton.com/tour-dates/atlantaga). Note: bare domain (no 'www.') 404'd on the asset path; the 'www.' subdomain succeeded. File is actually PNG content despite the .png extension being applied correctly here (source served image/png).

title: The Pixel Man Airshow
notes: ticketUrl/officialUrl in events.json is a Facebook event page; the FB og:image required following a JS/meta-refresh redirect to a login-walled photo.php page with no accessible image. Found the event's actual official site (tpmairshow.com, not previously listed in events.json) via web search and used its og:image (Gainesville Airport airshow, Oct 24 2026, hosted by 'The Pixel Man').
